reviews.author: Hari Prasad
reviews.text: Great team taking care of patient needs!

reviews.author: Maleny Zamarripa
reviews.text: Staff is super friendly, fast and efficient. Dr. Johnson is patient, caring and professional. Best team!

reviews.author: J W
reviews.text: We absolutely love VBP! The staff is so amazing and really care about the wellbeing of your child. Been there since day 2 of our first child and have never had a bad experience!

reviews.author: Kathy Modesitt
reviews.text: We love Dr. Vora. She is kind and knowledgeable and treats each us with respect. She also treats the teenagers as teenagers instead of little kids which is amazing too. This makes them able to communicate with her. She has the right balance of knowing when to prescribe and when to allow the body to heal in its own. Thank you Dr. Vora!

reviews.author: nikkjs10
reviews.text: Cannot say enough good things about this office. We saw Dr. Vora today and she was wonderful! Would give 10 stars if I could.

reviews.author: Charlene Scherf
reviews.text: Very informative, helpful and caring each time. Very pleased with our care.

reviews.author: Mette Seaton
reviews.text: Dr Johnson is just amazing. She listens and she cares.

reviews.author: Jennifer
reviews.text: I have Been bringing my kids here for over 20 years. Always the best care from Dr Cruz and Dr Wiji!! The staff is awesome too! Thank you for always treating my family like family ❤️

reviews.author: Erin Railey
reviews.text:
I have had nothing but great Appointment experiences since we followed Dr. Laura Johnson to this office.
The staff is welcoming and most importantly, great with my daughter.

reviews.author: Annie Lue
reviews.text: Dr Wiji is fantastic and thorough & has been since he was my pediatrician.

reviews.author: shawnie andersonl
reviews.text: Staff is always nice and doctors are awesome they listen to the parents and the kids, can’t ask for more.

reviews.author: Megan Hyde
reviews.text: We love Vero Beach Pediatrics and its entire staff. We feel heard, respected, and well cared for. Thank you for providing our community with a kind and compassionate practice.
